description_long: This is a stylized tombstone made of grayish stone, featuring a beveled top and a rectangular base. The front face is inscribed with the text 'R.I.P MY HOPES AND DREAMS' and is marked by several deep, claw-like scratches, adding a dramatic and slightly humorous touch. The stone has a matte finish and appears solid and heavy, with a broad, stable base that supports the upright slab. The back of the tombstone is plain and unadorned, while the sides are narrow and show the thickness of the stone. The overall design is simple yet evocative, suitable for a graveyard or cemetery setting in an urban park or memorial area.
description: A gray stone tombstone with a beveled top, inscribed with 'R.I.P MY HOPES AND DREAMS' and marked by claw-like scratches, set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the inscription 'R.I.P MY HOPES AND DREAMS' and several claw-like scratches on the face of the tombstone.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thickness of the tombstone and the layered base, with some scratches visible wrapping around the edge.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, unadorned back with no inscriptions or markings, emphasizing the solid stone construction.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the tombstone's thickness and the clean, smooth edge with minor visible scratches.
